title: RUSTPY-0009 — `repr(staticmethod(obj))` panics when the wrapped object's `__repr__` raises (`staticmethod.rs:182`)
one_line_repro: see repro.py -- repr(staticmethod(obj)) where obj.__repr__ raises
notes: staticmethod.__repr__ calls the wrapped object's repr() and .unwrap()s it -- a raising __repr__ panics instead of propagating. CPython raises the inner exception. Fix = ? not .unwrap().
